programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A neighbour at flashpoint with a young officer caught in the middle, the mysterious disappearance of an elderly lady and a family home hides an arsenal of weapons. Hosted by Simon Reeve.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A dangerous thief won't come easily for police while a unlicensed driver is worried about what will happen to his passengers, tonight on THE FORCE: BEHIND THE LINE. Hosted by SIMON REEVE.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Rich must defend his home from a mountain lion that has invaded his turf. A voracious wolverine threatens to derail Marty's season for good. Eustace puts his wood burning truck to the ultimate test.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: After a 1900s signal cannon bursts into the shop, Rick prepares for the big boom. Later, the shop says \.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Indiana Ivy and the Temple of Phlegm
programme.desc: Darrell is at risk of losing the title of 'The King of Montebello'. Brandi and Jarrod find their way back to the auction with the help of some pocket tech.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In an awesome Arkansas auction hall, Mike does business with a fast-talking taxidermy deer; in a ghost town full of empty storefronts, the guys pick an old school general store that's packed with merchandise; combing through a massive toy collection, Mike spies a retro billboard that could be worth a bundle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Grab a ringside seat when the team square off for memorabilia from undefeated boxing champ Rocky Marciano.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Bulldogs go head-to-head with the Swans, live and free from Marvel Stadium. Bounce time: 7:30 pm AEST.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A hit-and-run driver is found at home, but he's drugged and angry and not going to come easily. Officers try to stop a speeding biker who runs the orange light, but he's gapped it.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A drugged driver on the North Western is about to pass out. A bike gets t-boned, but who's to blame? When totalling your van means you've lost your home as well.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: Join superstar judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and KSI as they search for golden-buzzer worthy talent.

programme.title: Unbelievable Moments Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Incredible clips of eyewitness footage shot by members of the public.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: Jake Blues reunites with his brother Elwood to reform their old R&B band and save their childhood Catholic home, while evading the police in Chicago.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In an awesome Arkansas auction hall, Mike does business with a fast-talking taxidermy deer; in a ghost town full of empty storefronts, the guys pick an old school general store that's packed with merchandise; combing through a massive toy collection, Mike spies a retro billboard that could be worth a bundle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Grab a ringside seat when the team square off for memorabilia from undefeated boxing champ Rocky Marciano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get paranormal with the team when two first editions of A Christmas Carol appear in the shop.

programme.title: The Front Bar
programme.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: The guys encounter two creatures of the Amazon: The Paraponera clavata aka The Bullet Ant, and the Red-Bellied Piranha.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Our winner Brad Kearns has knocked two species off the Daiwa challenge and just needs to catch a snapper of 5kg to take home the gear. Stay tuned as this one comes down to the wire.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Come fishing with Merv Hughes on some great fishing adventures. It's a lighthearted fishing show with some ripping catches.

programme.title: Creek to Coast
programme.desc: Liz is fishing with first time anglers on the Sunny Coast. Gary gives his old boat trailer a refurb. Ben cooks up a seafood paella. Scott is in Tassie checking out the local crustaceans.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics, we delve into the archives to celebrate three of Nissan's best wins in the history of the Australian Touring Car and Supercars Championship.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics, we re-live the breakthrough wins of three of Supercars modern stars - Will Davison, James Courtney & David Reynolds.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: NFL
programme.desc: Live coverage of the 2026 NFL Draft from Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Grab a ringside seat when the team square off for memorabilia from undefeated boxing champ Rocky Marciano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get paranormal with the team when two first editions of A Christmas Carol appear in the shop.

programme.title: Kick Ons
programme.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports Series
programme.desc: Follow Australia's top lumberjack sports athletes as they compete with axes and saws.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty fights back against a wolverine but it takes him on a treacherous journey. Charlie takes a big risk in uncharted wilderness. Tom claims his place on the food chain.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Sammy Hagar hires Rick to restore a vintage refrigerator into a rum dispenser. Later, the shop sets to work on a horse-themed slot machine that has been dropped and no longer works.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary needs help managing a tiny parking lot in Van Nuys, California. Ivy goes on the prowl for a bike. Dave scores a therapeutic locker.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With Civil War relics and bargain basement prices, the guys scour an extraordinary New Jersey collection. After years of searching, Mike finally zeroes in on a rare 1911 Harley motor he needs to complete a restoration project, but there's a catch. Later, housed in a small-town church, Dave's heavenly stockpile features retro relics and unbeatable prices.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Play hardball with the team when an autograph of baseball legend Honus Wagner lands in the shop.

programme.title: AFL: Friday Night Countdown
programme.desc: Friday Night Countdown gives footy fans the perfect lead-in to the weekend's round of footy.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Tigers clash with the Demons, live and free from the MCG. Bounce time: 7:40 pm AEST.

programme.title: AFL Post Game
programme.desc: A look back at all the action from tonight's game.

programme.title: Get On Extra
programme.desc: Each week join Lizzie Jelfs, Matt Hill, Simon Marshall and Brent Zerafa as they dive headlong into the all the weekend's best racing to find you their best bets.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: A docile family man slowly reveals his true character after his house gets burgled by two petty thieves, which, coincidentally, leads him into a bloody war with a Russian crime boss.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty fights back against a wolverine but it takes him on a treacherous journey. Charlie takes a big risk in uncharted wilderness. Tom claims his place on the food chain.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Sammy Hagar hires Rick to restore a vintage refrigerator into a rum dispenser. Later, the shop sets to work on a horse-themed slot machine that has been dropped and no longer works.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary needs help managing a tiny parking lot in Van Nuys, California. Ivy goes on the prowl for a bike. Dave scores a therapeutic locker.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With Civil War relics and bargain basement prices, the guys scour an extraordinary New Jersey collection. After years of searching, Mike finally zeroes in on a rare 1911 Harley motor he needs to complete a restoration project, but there's a catch. Later, housed in a small-town church, Dave's heavenly stockpile features retro relics and unbeatable prices.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: Adam and Caveman Rob wrap up the season in Indonesia, with the two worst bites to date, from a Giant Asian Centipede and a 16-foot Reticulated Python.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: The team take father of four Terry Foden all the way to the Western Australia Scott Reef, 300 nautical miles off the Australian coast.

programme.title: Al McGlashan's Fish'n With Mates
programme.desc: Al McGlashan's ticking off items from his personal fishing bucket list, including the chance to swim with a swirling vortex of spawning snapper despite the danger of lurking sharks.

programme.title: Charter Boat Wars 2: Port Phillip Bay
programme.desc: Skippers navigate challenging conditions and go head-to-head in competition on the open water, testing skill and resilience.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics we look back at three Grand Final rounds of the Australian Touring Car Championship, all held at Oran Park in Sydney.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics, we look back at three of Kiwi Champion, Shane van Gisbergen's greatest wins.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With Civil War relics and bargain basement prices, the guys scour an extraordinary New Jersey collection. After years of searching, Mike finally zeroes in on a rare 1911 Harley motor he needs to complete a restoration project, but there's a catch. Later, housed in a small-town church, Dave's heavenly stockpile features retro relics and unbeatable prices.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Play hardball with the team when an autograph of baseball legend Honus Wagner lands in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Send out an SOS with the team when a WWII Morse code reader clicks into the shop.

programme.title: The 4WD Adventure Show
programme.desc: Whether it's an outback adventure or a day trip out of Perth, there's nothing better than getting away!

programme.title: Life off Road
programme.desc: Celebrates all aspects of four-wheel driving and off-roading.

programme.title: The Car Club
programme.desc: Bruce, Mark and Amelia meet car enthusiasts sharing their passion of cars from old to new, and everything in between.

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports Series
programme.desc: Follow Australia's top lumberjack sports athletes as they compete with axes and saws.

programme.title: Blokesworld
programme.desc: Ado and Camera 3 travel the world to prove that blokes are the same all over, and they all share the same passions.

programme.title: My Road to Adventure
programme.desc: Cam Sinclair, one of Australia's all-time freestyle motocross greats, returns to Phillip Island, Victoria with family and friends to revisit his roots travelling in his Jayco Basestation, Pt. 2.

programme.title: AFL Pre-Game
programme.desc: A look ahead at today's AFL game.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Bombers go up against the Magpies, live and free from the MCG. Bounce time: 3:20 pm AEST.
